subject: Sports
title: LeBron James: The Chosen One
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: LeBron James: The Chosen One.

hook.text: Sports Illustrated put him on the cover at age 17 and called him 'The Chosen One.' He delivered.

buildup.text: LeBron was drafted first overall in 2003 and dominated the NBA for over two decades.

discovery.text: He won four championships with three different teams—Cleveland, Miami, and the Lakers.

twist.text: 'The Decision'—announcing his move to Miami on live TV—made him the most hated athlete in America for years.

climax.text: LeBron became the NBA's all-time leading scorer in 2023, passing Kareem Abdul-Jabbar.

punchline.text: They called him The Chosen One at 17. He proved them right.

quiz.question: What record did LeBron break in 2023?
